about.title: About Us
about.p1: Cynara is a studio focused on building innovative software systems. We work with forward-thinking companies to create solutions that drive real impact.
about.p2: Founded on principles of simplicity and excellence, we approach every project with curiosity and dedication.
about.p3: Our team brings together expertise in software engineering, product design, and system architecture.
about.approachDesc: Collaborative, transparent, and focused on results.

product1.name: Cloud Intelligence Platform
product1.desc: Intelligent cloud management platform that provides one-stop cloud solutions for enterprises, including resource management, security monitoring, and data analysis.

product2.name: Collaboration Space
product2.desc: Efficient team collaboration tool with real-time document editing, task management, and audio/video conferencing capabilities.

product3.name: Data Insight
product3.desc: Intelligent data analysis platform providing visual reports, AI predictive analytics, and data mining capabilities.
